title: olearia myrsinoides var. serrata
intro: Olearia myrsinoides var. serrata is a variety of the Olearia myrsinoides plant, also known as the New Zealand tree daisy or New Zealand button daisy, which is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Olearia myrsinoides var. serrata include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be used to make various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
